text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 67 

PTB_DRUG_MDCR_PMT 

LABEL: Part B Drug Medicare Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payments for Part B drugs for a given year. Part B drug claims are a 
subset of the claims in the Part B carrier and DME data files. 

The Part B drug claim lines are identified by BETOS codes (CCW variable BETOS_CD with values of “D1G,” 
“O1D,” “O1E,” “O1G,” “I1E,” or
